theme_details.rationale: For PixelCraft, a high-end tech and creative agency building websites, apps, and AI agents. A dark theme with gold typography projects opulence, sophistication, and a premium 'Godly' feel. It stands out from generic SaaS templates by utilizing intentional color storytelling, deep shadows, and cinematic textures.

scale.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl lg:text-7xl font-bold tracking-tighter leading-[1.1]

rules: Headings must use tight letter spacing (tracking-tighter) for a premium editorial look.
Never use Inter or generic sans for headings.
Use overlines for section subheaders (e.g., 'OUR EXPERTISE').
Never use pure black #000000; use #050505 to give it depth.
Use gold strictly as an accent or for critical CTAs and high-hierarchy text elements.

cards.style: Flat background (#0A0A0A), 1px subtle gold border (border-[#D4AF37]/20), no heavy shadow.
cards.hover: Hover state transitions border to border-[#D4AF37]/60 with a subtle glow (shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(212,175,55,0.15)])

surfaces_and_effects.hero_overlay: bg-gradient-to-b from-[#050505]/40 via-[#050505]/60 to-[#050505] - DO NOT make it solid black.

buttons.primary: bg-[#D4AF37] text-[#050505] font-semibold px-8 py-4 rounded-none hover:bg-[#FFD700] transition-colors duration-300
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent text-[#FAFAFA] border border-[#D4AF37]/30 px-8 py-4 rounded-none hover:border-[#D4AF37] hover:bg-[#D4AF37]/5 transition-all duration-300

forms.inputs: bg-[#0A0A0A] border-white/10 text-white rounded-none focus:border-[#D4AF37] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#D4AF37] transition-all

components.marquee: Use react-fast-marquee with monochromatic/gold-tinted brand icons for technologies (React, Node, Python, AWS, etc.).
components.navigation: Fixed at top, z-50, crystal glassmorphism, right-aligned nav links with hover text-[#D4AF37]. Primary CTA button on the far right.

motion.scroll: MANDATORY: Use lenis for smooth scrolling.
motion.reveal: Use framer-motion. Initial: opacity-0, translate-y-8. WhileInView: opacity-100, translate-y-0. Stagger children for lists/grids.
motion.hover: Scale images within overflow-hidden containers (scale-105 duration-700 ease-out) on card hover.

hero_background.description: Abstract luxury 3D geometric shapes in metallic black and glowing gold. Use as hero background.

services.name: Web Development
services.description: Abstract golden spiral for Web Dev service.

services.name: Mobile Apps
services.description: App wireframe glowing in gold for Mobile Apps service.

services.name: Automation
services.description: Dynamic abstract fluid art in gold/black for Automation.

services.name: UI/UX
services.description: Slate texture with delicate gold flakes for UI/UX.

pages_and_structure.routing: Since it's a marketing site, a single long-scrolling page layout with anchor links is highly effective, but separate routes (Home, About Us, Services, Portfolio, Pricing, Contact Us) can also be built based on router setup.

sections.Hero: Massive typography, CTA button to Services/Contact, using hero_background image.
sections.Services: Bento grid (Mode A) showcasing Web Dev, Mobile Apps, AI Agents, Automation, UI/UX, Security. Use media URLs for card backgrounds with dark overlays.
sections.Portfolio: 3-column grid showing off high-end work. Hover reveals case study details.
sections.About_Team: Split layout (text left, image right) telling the PixelCraft story. Use office/worker media.
sections.Testimonials: Minimalist typographic quotes, high contrast, muted gold author names.
sections.Pricing: 3-tier pricing cards. Center card 'Pro' highlighted with gold borders and 'Tracing Beam' effect if possible.
sections.Contact: Shadcn-based form with dark/gold styling. Info column containing Phone/Address.
sections.Footer: Massive footer (py-32). Huge 'PixelCraft' text at the bottom. Grid of links, all functional.

testing_attributes: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid. Examples: data-testid='nav-services-link', data-testid='hero-cta-button', data-testid='contact-submit-button'.
